name: The Ultimate Chocolate Chip Cookie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine Crisco, brown sugar, milk, and vanilla in a large bowl. Beat until creamy.
3. Add egg and beat into the mixture.
4. Stir in flour, salt, and baking soda until just combined.
5. Fold in chocolate chips and pecan pieces (if using).
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet, spacing about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake for 8-10 minutes for chewy cookies (cookies will appear moist; do not overbake), or 11-13 minutes for crisp cookies.
8. Cool on the baking sheet for 2 minutes before transferring to a cooling rack. Makes 3 dozen cookies.
